allow: Bash(python -c "import mediapipe; print\(mediapipe.__version__\); import pkgutil; print\([m.name for m in pkgutil.iter_modules\(mediapipe.__path__\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import mediapipe; import mediapipe.tasks; import mediapipe.tasks.python; import mediapipe.tasks.python.vision; print\(dir\(mediapipe.tasks.python.vision\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import mediapipe; print\(dir\(mediapipe\)\); import mediapipe.tasks as t; print\(dir\(t\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import mediapipe.tasks as t; import mediapipe.tasks.vision as v; print\(dir\(v\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import pkgutil, mediapipe.tasks; [print\(m.name\) for m in pkgutil.iter_modules\(mediapipe.tasks.__path__\)]")
